data.reason: Correctly moves worktree cleanup to after the merge/push flow instead of before it, preventing inconsistent state on mid-flow failures. The finally block improvement adds a null check on worktree_path and conditionally keeps the branch based on task completion status, which is more intelligent cleanup. No secrets, no debug code, targeted fix.

Coherent security improvement: adds Unix file permission check on ~/.env with appropriate warning, and stops leaking the API key into os.environ (preventing subprocess inheritance) by using an in-memory cache instead. No secrets, debug code, or destructive changes introduced. Standard library imports only.
